header.summary: MS Computer Science (4.0 GPA) at Northeastern University, graduating May 2027. Former Software Engineer @WebMD, where I optimized Medscape.com (10M+ users) achieving 20% traffic uplift and 1.2s latency reduction. Actively seeking SDE internships from May 2026 to December 2026. Full-Stack expertise: MERN Stack, Vue.js, Node.js, C++. Learning: Generative AI, Machine Learning, AWS Cloud Architecture.

experience.description: Led migration of Medscape.com (10M+ monthly users) from Vue 2 to Vue 3, reducing bundle size by 35% and improving page load latency by 1.2 seconds. Implemented SSR optimization and CSS-in-JS architecture. Built healthcare platform with 8-person team; created reusable Vue.js component library.

Developed custom team management dashboard using JIRA RESTful APIs, streamlining resource tracking and role distribution. Accelerated Vue 3 migration by resolving critical legacy bugs and optimizing CI/CD pipelines, ensuring stability for early-stage feature releases.

Engineered custom billing and receipt generation system featuring dynamic PDF printing and template customization. Automated data reporting pipelines using CRON jobs and Google Sheets API to synchronize database records in real-time, eliminating manual data entry.

projects.name: Amazon Review Sentiment Analyzer
projects.description:
• Advanced Chrome extension (Manifest V3) for Amazon product sentiment analysis
• Multi-page scraping with persistent local storage and caching
• AI-powered NLP using FastAPI backend, LangChain, and OpenAI APIs
• Real-time sentiment detection and aggregation across review pages
• Visual insights dashboard with sentiment metrics and trends
• Docker containerization for scalable deployment
• Secure credential handling and privacy-first architecture

projects.name: Kambaz
projects.description:
• Modern LMS with Next.js 15.5 frontend and React 19 components
• Express.js backend with 20+ REST API endpoints and JWT authentication
• MongoDB database with Mongoose ODM for persistent data storage
• Course management system with hierarchical organization
• Quiz creation engine with automatic grading and answer validation
• Student progress tracking with performance analytics
+• Instructor dashboard for course management and student oversight
+• Multi-user role support (Students, Instructors, Admins)
+• Real-time notifications and event broadcasts
+• Dockerized deployment and responsive Bootstrap UI

projects.name: GuruNetwork
projects.description:
• Vue.js 3 Single Page Application (SPA) with Firebase backend
• 7 user categories with dynamic forms: agents, buyers, sellers, investors, admins, guests, auditors
• Real-time Cloud Firestore synchronization with offline capabilities
• 10-minute automated Google Sheets sync for data reporting
• Cloud Functions microservices for business logic
+• SendGrid email automation with customizable templates
+• ETL pipelines for data consistency and deduplication
+• Firestore triggers for transactional workflows
+• Google OAuth authentication for secure access
+• Role-based access control (RBAC) for multi-team collaboration

projects.name: Marathe Group

• Professional website at marathegroup.co.in with Vue.js 3 + Vuetify
• Interactive Swiper.js property galleries with smooth transitions
• AOS (Animate On Scroll) animations for engaging UX
• EmailJS contact forms with automatic response emails
• Mobile app via Android WebView for cross-platform reach

projects.name: Shree Ganesh Agency
projects.description:
• Enterprise CRM built with Vue.js 3 and Firebase backend

achievements.title: Detection of Counterfeit Products Using Blockchain
achievements.description: Published peer-reviewed paper on blockchain-based counterfeit detection. Received Copyright Certificate from the Government of India.

recommendations.name: Arthur Smith
recommendations.headline: Associate Director Core Platform at Aptus Health
recommendations.text: Rushikesh is a highly dependable developer who consistently impressed me with his ability to take ownership of complex problems and deliver fast, reliable solutions. Beyond his strong technical skills, he’s warm and approachable, quickly masters new concepts, mentors colleagues, and fully commits to the success of every initiative. I genuinely enjoyed working with him and would welcome the chance to work together again without hesitation.

recommendations.name: Anis Melliti
recommendations.headline: European Tech Lead at Aptus Health
recommendations.text: I had the pleasure of leading Rushikesh for three years, and during that time he proved to be one of those rare teammates who combines curiosity, discipline, and genuine passion for building great software. From day one, he showed how quickly he could learn new technologies, but what stood out even more was how fast he turned that knowledge into real value for our projects. Whenever there was an opportunity to apply a new technique or improve a workflow, he was the first to explore it and the first to put it into action. His willingness to experiment and learn didn’t just help our team evolve technically — it pushed us to think bigger. As he grew within the team, Rushikesh naturally started taking ownership of initiatives. Without needing much time, he began leading technical improvements and mentoring others with a calm, thoughtful approach that earned everyone’s respect. Overall, he’s a fast learner, intelligent, and genuinely hardworking but also someone who elevates the people around him. I have no doubt he will continue to excel in any environment he joins next

recommendations.name: Gopal Hannurkar
recommendations.headline: Software Engineer | Front End Developer | Vue.js | SPA | SSR | JavaScript | HTML | CSS | Node js | Agile | Jira
recommendations.relation: Gopal worked with Rushikesh on the same team
recommendations.text: I had the absolute pleasure of working with Rushikesh at WebMD. He is a highly skilled software engineer who consistently solved complex problems across multiple web development projects. Rushikesh not only improved overall page performance but also enhanced the architecture of our applications, making them more scalable and maintainable. His technical expertise, proactive approach, and dedication to quality make him an invaluable asset to any team. I highly recommend Rushikesh for any software development role.

recommendations.name: Ashwini Dhure
recommendations.headline: Technical Lead at WebMD
recommendations.text: Over the 2.5 years I supervised Rushikesh at WebMD, he became a go-to contributor on our JIM and Univadis initiatives. Rushikesh combines strong technical judgment with thoughtful collaboration — he breaks down complex problems, proposes practical solutions, and helps bring teammates along through clear communication and knowledge sharing. He consistently met deadlines, embraced feedback, and showed an eagerness to learn that noticeably improved our team’s workflow and output. I have no doubt Rushikesh will excel in new challenges and would be an excellent addition to any organization as he advances his career in the U.S.

recommendations.name: Chakib Melaika
recommendations.headline: Director, Technical Project Management @WebMD
recommendations.text: Rushikesh is one of the best developer I had the pleasure to work with. In the project that I was leading he was a true pillar in the team. Rushikesh act as a problem solver and can navigate complex technical layers to achieve his tasks. Beyond his technical expertise, Rushikesh is a great team player: proactive, communicative, and always willing to help. I highly recommend Rushikesh for any cross-functional engineering role. Any team would be lucky to have him.

recommendations.name: Pawan Sundargiri
recommendations.headline: Software Engineer @WebMD
recommendations.relation: Rushikesh was senior to Pawan but didn’t manage Pawan directly
recommendations.text: I’d like to highly recommend Rushikesh for his exceptional problem-solving skills and remarkable communication abilities. His thoughtful and structured approach to tackling challenges consistently stands out. Rushikesh played a key role in building JIMFR and is also instrumental in shaping the Element Plus architecture for Medacape pages, including the migration of existing pages to Element Plus. Beyond his technical contributions, Rushikesh also served as my mentor during my early days at the company, providing guidance and support that greatly accelerated my learning and onboarding. His dedication, leadership, and expertise make him an invaluable asset to any team
